changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create main table for order analytics
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders_analytics ( order_id UInt64, order_status Enum8('PAYMENT_PENDING' = 1, 'CONFIRMED' = 2, 'CANCELLED' = 3), total_amount Decimal(18, 2), user_id String, user_email String, item_count UInt16, event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC'), processed_at DateTime DEFAULT now() ) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_time) ORDER BY (event_time, order_id);
